ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: High quality text-based PDF. All fields clearly legible.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: High quality text-based PDF with two pages. All fields clearly legible. Page 2 contains signature page only.

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number is SEG-25D-394888 which does not constitute an LC reference. No fields labeled 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit' or similar bank term labels are present.

locations_found: Invoice page 1: Header/company name block - 'Central National Sweden AB'
Invoice page 1: Address block - 'Södra Larmgatan 6, Gothenburg, 41 116, Sweden'
Invoice page 1: Footer signature block - 'CENTRAL NATIONAL SWEDEN AB'
Invoice page 2: Header/company name block - 'Central National Sweden AB'
Invoice page 2: Company stamp/seal - 'Central National Sweden AB'

pairing_validation.motivation: Consignor 'Central National Sweden AB' is identifiable as the invoice issuer in the invoice header. Consignee 'SOCARTO' is identifiable as 'Socarto S.A' in the SOLD TO and CONSIGNED TO fields. No invoice number is referenced in the certificate, but two of three pairing criteria are met. Document pair is valid.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Central National Sweden AB, Södra Larmgatan 6, 411 16, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
checkpoints.invoice_value: Central National Sweden AB, Södra Larmgatan 6, Gothenburg, 41 116, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name in all invoice pages
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - 'Central National Sweden AB' found directly in invoice header as the invoice issuer

rules_applied.rule_description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found directly in invoice as issuer
Land verification – Sweden in certificate matches Sweden in invoice header address

evidence.raw_text: Central National Sweden AB, Södra Larmgatan 6, 411 16, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
Central National Sweden AB, Södra Larmgatan 6, Gothenburg, 41 116, Sweden

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'Central National Sweden AB' with address 'Södra Larmgatan 6, 411 16, GÖTEBORG, Sweden'. Invoice issuer is 'Central National Sweden AB' with address 'Södra Larmgatan 6, Gothenburg, 41 116, Sweden'. The company name is identical. The city name differs slightly ('GÖTEBORG' vs 'Gothenburg') which is a well-known alternate English/Swedish name for the same city and is irrelevant since street addresses and country match. Additionally, the invoice VAT number starts with SE (SE559187836701), confirming Sweden. Country: Sweden matches Sweden. Per rule 4.1.0, the consignor name is found directly as the invoice issuer. Result: MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Central National Sweden AB' med adress i Sverige identifieras direkt som fakturans utställare med samma företagsnamn och samma gatuadress i Sverige. MATCH.

checkpoints.invoice_value: Socarto S.A, BP 5028, Douala, Cameroon (SOLD TO and CONSIGNED TO)

comparison_steps.description: Invoice contains SOLD TO field with 'Socarto S.A, BP 5028, Douala, Cameroon' and CONSIGNED TO field with identical party

Certificate says 'SOCARTO', invoice says 'Socarto S.A'. Core name 'SOCARTO' matches 'Socarto' after case normalization. 'S.A' is a legal form suffix (Société Anonyme) which is not part of the identity-bearing name.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH via 4.1.3.6 (legal form abbreviation applied to consignee per 4.2 preamble)

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: Cameroon. Invoice SOLD TO: Cameroon.

rules_applied.rule_description: Priority order for consignee identification – SOLD TO field used as primary
Legal form abbreviation – 'S.A' (Société Anonyme) is a legal form suffix, certificate omits it, core name 'SOCARTO' is identical
Address difference not relevant – BP 5028, DOUALA/Douala match after case normalization

evidence.description: Invoice SOLD TO and CONSIGNED TO
evidence.source: Invoice SOLD TO and CONSIGNED TO fields

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'SOCARTO' at 'BP 5028, DOUALA, Cameroon'. Invoice SOLD TO is 'Socarto S.A' at 'BP 5028, Douala, Cameroon'. Invoice also has a CONSIGNED TO field with identical information. The core company name 'SOCARTO' matches 'Socarto' after case normalization (4.1.3.1). The difference is that the invoice adds 'S.A' which is a legal form suffix (Société Anonyme) per rule 4.1.3.6. The core name is identical, the address matches (BP 5028, Douala/DOUALA), and country Cameroon matches. Per rule 4.1.3.6 applied to consignee (as stated in 4.2 preamble): legal form suffix differences do not cause MISMATCH. Result: MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'SOCARTO' identifieras i fakturans SOLD TO-fält som 'Socarto S.A'. Kärnnamnet 'Socarto' är identiskt efter normalisering av versaler/gemener. 'S.A' är en juridisk bolagsform (Société Anonyme) som inte påverkar identifieringen. Adress BP 5028, Douala och land Cameroon överensstämmer. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: No article numbers are stated in the certificate. Priority 1 not applicable.
Identify the identity-bearing main designation in certificate: 'Unbleached Kraft Standard + XBR'. Search for this in invoice description.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - 'Unbleached Kraft Standard + XBR' found exactly in invoice description

comparison_steps.description: Invoice adds '(120+50)' after the main designation and additional specification lines. These are non-identity-bearing additions (specifications).
comparison_steps.result: Additional text does not affect product identity

rules_applied.rule_description: Controlled text matching – identity-bearing main designation 'Unbleached Kraft Standard + XBR' found exactly in invoice
Non-identity-bearing additions – '(120+50)' and specification details are additional information that do not change product identity

evidence.raw_text:
28 Packages (124 Reels)
Unbleached Kraft Standard + XBR

Unbleached Kraft Standard + XBR (120+50)
Subs 170gsm, RW 320mm, DIA 800mm, Core 76mm
120 gsm kraft+50 gsm XBR

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate goods description: 'Unbleached Kraft Standard + XBR'. Invoice goods description: 'Unbleached Kraft Standard + XBR (120+50)'. The identity-bearing main designation 'Unbleached Kraft Standard + XBR' is found EXACTLY in the invoice description (after case normalization both contain the same text). The invoice adds '(120+50)' which is a specification/grammage detail, and additional lines with product specifications (Subs 170gsm, RW 320mm, DIA 800mm, Core 76mm). Per rule 4.3.4, these are non-identity-bearing additions that do not change product identity. No article numbers in certificate so Priority 1 is not applicable. Result: MATCH via Priority 2 controlled text matching.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'Unbleached Kraft Standard + XBR' återfinns exakt i fakturans varubeskrivning. Fakturans tillägg '(120+50)' och specifikationsrader är icke-identitetsbärande tillägg som inte ändrar produktidentiteten. MATCH.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Net weight: 15.025 MT, Gross weight: 15.305 MT
checkpoints.invoice_value: Total Weight Quantity: 15.025 MT, Total Gross Weight Quantity: 15.305 MT

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 7 contains: Net weight 15.025 MT and Gross weight 15.305 MT. Both values with explicit unit (MT) and weight category (Net/Gross).
comparison_steps.result: Both NW and GW identified as verification quantities

comparison_steps.description: Certificate NW: 15.025 MT. Invoice 'Total Weight Quantity: 15.025 MT'. Exact numeric and unit match.
Certificate GW: 15.305 MT. Invoice 'Total Gross Weight Quantity: 15.305 MT'. Exact numeric and unit match.
Both NW and GW match exactly. No contradictions found.

rules_applied.rule_description: Förekomstkontroll – both NW 15.025 MT and GW 15.305 MT found exactly in invoice
Box 7 weight values used as verification basis
Weight category – both GW and NW explicitly stated in certificate with unit MT
Multiple quantities – both NW and GW verified, no contradictions

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate states Net weight: 15.025 MT and Gross weight: 15.305 MT (both in box 6/7 area). Invoice states 'Total Gross Weight Quantity: 15.305 MT' and 'Total Weight Quantity: 15.025 MT'. Also the description line states '15.025 MT AT EUR 3 500.00/MT'. Net weight: 15.025 MT in certificate = 15.025 MT in invoice → exact match. Gross weight: 15.305 MT in certificate = 15.305 MT in invoice → exact match. Both weight categories (NW and GW) are explicitly stated with unit MT. No contradictions. No calculation or summation needed. Result: MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets nettovikt 15.025 MT och bruttovikt 15.305 MT identifieras exakt i fakturans totalrader (Total Weight Quantity: 15.025 MT och Total Gross Weight Quantity: 15.305 MT). Exakt numerisk matchning med enhet och viktkategori. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice contains explicit field 'Country of Origin: Italy'
Certificate: 'Italy'. Invoice: 'Italy'. Exact match, no normalization needed.

rules_applied.rule_description: Identification – 'Country of Origin: Italy' found as explicit origin field in invoice
Positive verification – Italy in certificate exactly matches Italy in invoice origin field

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate states Country of Origin: 'Italy' (Box 3). Invoice contains explicit field 'Country of Origin: Italy'. Exact textual match. Note: The certificate consignor is in Sweden but the origin is Italy. Per rule 4.5 critical rule, origin refers to where the goods are manufactured/produced, not where the consignor is located. Italy ≠ Sweden is not a basis for MISMATCH or concern. Single origin country, no mixed origins to handle. Result: MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'Italy' (ruta 3) återfinns exakt i fakturans explicita ursprungsfält 'Country of Origin: Italy'. Exakt överensstämmelse. MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in certificate. Certificate number SEG-25D-394888 does not constitute an LC reference.
Document A is clearly a Certificate of Origin (ICC format, EU). Document B is clearly a Commercial Invoice issued by Central National Sweden AB. Separate files, clear roles.
Consignor 'Central National Sweden AB' is the invoice issuer. Consignee 'SOCARTO' matches invoice SOLD TO 'Socarto S.A'. Two of three criteria met.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Koncernstruktur – consignor search in all invoice files
rule_evaluation_log.motivation: Consignor name 'Central National Sweden AB' found directly as invoice issuer in header on both pages, and in footer signature block.
Certificate: Sweden. Invoice header address: Sweden. VAT prefix SE confirms Sweden.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Legal form abbreviation for consignee – S.A (Société Anonyme)
rule_evaluation_log.motivation: Certificate consignee 'SOCARTO' vs invoice 'Socarto S.A'. 'S.A' is a legal form suffix. Core name identical.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Consignee priority order – SOLD TO as primary billing field
rule_evaluation_log.motivation: Invoice has explicit SOLD TO field with 'Socarto S.A'. This is the primary billing field.
Certificate: Cameroon. Invoice SOLD TO: Cameroon.
No article numbers stated in certificate.
Identity-bearing main designation 'Unbleached Kraft Standard + XBR' found exactly in invoice description.
Invoice adds '(120+50)' and specification lines after the main designation. These are product specifications, not identity-changing.
Both NW 15.025 MT and GW 15.305 MT found exactly in invoice total lines.
Certificate explicitly states 'Net weight' and 'Gross weight' with unit MT. Invoice confirms both categories.
Invoice contains explicit 'Country of Origin: Italy' field matching certificate box 3 'Italy'.
Certificate states 'Italy' specifically, not 'EU' or 'European Union'. Single origin country, direct match.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Consignee MISMATCH due to 'SOCARTO' vs 'Socarto S.A'
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The difference consists solely of the legal form suffix 'S.A' (Société Anonyme). Per rule 4.1.3.6 (applied to consignee via 4.2 preamble), differences in legal form suffix do not constitute MISMATCH when the core name is identical and country matches.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Potential origin concern because consignor is Sweden but origin is Italy
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.5 critical rule, origin refers to where goods are manufactured/produced, not consignor's country. A Swedish consignor shipping Italian-origin goods is entirely normal and valid.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Samtliga kontrollpunkter överensstämmer. Avsändaren Central National Sweden AB, mottagaren Socarto, varubeskrivningen Unbleached Kraft Standard + XBR, vikterna (netto 15.025 MT och brutto 15.305 MT) samt ursprungslandet Italien kan alla verifieras mot fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary: All five checkpoints verified as MATCH. Consignor exactly matches invoice issuer. Consignee matches with allowed legal form suffix difference (S.A). Goods description identity-bearing designation matches exactly. Both NW and GW match exactly. Country of origin Italy matches explicitly. No LC exception triggered. No normalizations beyond case normalization and legal form suffix handling required.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.certificate_value: Central National Sweden AB, Södra Larmgatan 6, 411 16, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Central National Sweden AB, Södra Larmgatan 6, Gothenburg, 41 116, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Direkt identifiering – consignor är fakturans utställare med samma företagsnamn och adress.
sections.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'Central National Sweden AB' förekommer i fakturans sidhuvud som utställare. Gatuadress Södra Larmgatan 6 matchar. Land Sverige verifieras via adress och VAT-prefix SE. MATCH.

sections.invoice_value: Socarto S.A, BP 5028, Douala, Cameroon (SOLD TO)
sections.rule_applied: Juridisk bolagsform – skillnaden består enbart av tillägg av 'S.A' (Société Anonyme) som juridisk bolagsform. Kärnnamnet är identiskt.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'SOCARTO' återfinns i fakturans SOLD TO-fält som 'Socarto S.A'. Kärnnamnet 'Socarto' är identiskt. 'S.A' är Société Anonyme – en juridisk bolagsform. Adress BP 5028, Douala och land Cameroon matchar. MATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning – identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning identifierad exakt. Tillägg i fakturan är specifikationer som inte ändrar produktidentitet.
sections.motivation: Den identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningen 'Unbleached Kraft Standard + XBR' återfinns exakt i fakturan. Fakturans tillägg '(120+50)' och specifikationsrader avser produktspecifikationer och ändrar inte produktidentiteten. MATCH.

sections.certificate_value: Net weight: 15.025 MT, Gross weight: 15.305 MT
sections.invoice_value: Total Weight Quantity: 15.025 MT, Total Gross Weight Quantity: 15.305 MT
sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll – båda viktvärden identifieras exakt i fakturans totalrader.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets nettovikt 15.025 MT matchar exakt fakturans 'Total Weight Quantity: 15.025 MT'. Certifikatets bruttovikt 15.305 MT matchar exakt fakturans 'Total Gross Weight Quantity: 15.305 MT'. Båda viktkategorierna överensstämmer. MATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Direkt identifiering – ursprungsland anges explicit i fakturans dedikerade ursprungsfält.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'Italy' matchar exakt fakturans explicita fält 'Country of Origin: Italy'. MATCH.

output_quality_checks.notes: All five checkpoints are MATCH with confidence >= 0.96. comparison_result is IDENTICAL. workflow_recommendation is AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE. All consistency checks pass.
